title: Zoöp Connections 2026
content:
The Institute joins Zoöp Connections 2026, initiated by EUNIC Netherlands, with artist residencies fostering regenerative, more-than-human relationships.

The post Zoöp Connections 2026 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
creator: ela
sourceTitle: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
sourceDescription: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux

title: Are you our next EDUFI intern?
content:
The application period for the EDUFI internship for autumn 2026 is open from 24.2–10.3.2026. The four-month internship at the Institute begins on 17.8. Good luck!

The post Are you our next EDUFI intern? appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
creator: Margareeta Lauronen
sourceTitle: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
sourceDescription: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
